channel.title: Git on dyrone
channel.description: Recent content in Git on dyrone

item.title: How git make i18n work?
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: This article is to introduce i18n with gettext in CLang and how git implements i18n. Git is writtern by CLang, so it’s used gettext to make i18n work, let’s take a look at gettext. 1. Glance of gettext #include "stdio.h" #include <locale.h> #include <libintl.h> int main(int argc, char const *argv[]) { /* code */ printf(gettext(" My name is %s.\n "), "dyrone"); return 0; } gcc get_text.c -o get_text

item.title: How to debug git?
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: When I am starting to learn about development skills of git, first thing flash in my thoughts is to debug it, because debug is usually is the best way to understand how a huge program works. begin with git-init builtin cmd git contains many builtin cmd ,look at in your project root dir: In another word, git is organized by git buildin cmds, When you run a git cmd such as git push or git init etc, git main routine will try to resolve it to the corresponding builtin cmd, For example,git cmd with args init => git init is coresponding to git-init builtint cmd.

item.title: git rev news 48[Chinese]
item.author: dyroneteng@gmail.com (dyrone)
item.description: 引言: 每月一期的 Git Rev News 是由 GitHub 上的志愿者合作撰写的 Git 文摘，其中包含：当月 Git 邮件列表中的一些讨论，Git 社区人物介绍以及其他 Git 相关文章。Git Rev News 能帮助我们及时了解社区动态。 本期技术分享来源： Git Rev News #48,2019/02/27 本次因为git-merge大会内容较多，我们将把社区讨论内容和业界动态部分放在前面介绍，git-merge大会内容放在最后。 一. 新闻 1. Various git merge 大会blog: https://github.blog/2019-02-12-mission-report-git-merge-2019/ 未来阿里巴巴代码平台一定要争取参与进去,慢慢成为git核心技术的开创者和引领者 gerrit的多站点插件将会公开：https://groups.google.com/forum/#!topic/repo-discuss/A9dGOppvgGA git的2019编程之夏活动： https://git.github.io/SoC-2019-Ideas/ 2. Light reading gitgeist: a git-based social network proof of concept by Karim Yaghmour (mentioned on LWN.net) https://github.com/opersys/gitgeist-poc 感兴趣的同学可以看下，不过多介绍。 France enters the Matrix [LWN.
